_comment: Enemy jungler gank-style for the gank-window alert (advisory, data-driven prediction; the app never sees the map). 'early' = level-3 gankers (~2:45), 'standard' = full-clear then gank (~3:15), 'farming' = scaling junglers whose real gank threat is level 6. Unlisted champions default to 'standard'. Adding a champion is a data edit here.
